┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, my deers! Another fluff bot fresh out of the oven, straight for you, and this time it's the greatest tomboy of all time, our magnificent Caesar King! This bot was suggested by my deer SHINING FINGER! I hope you all enjoy this bot as I did and stay well!

🦌And no, I haven't forgotten some of your requests, I just have little time to make bots and with that little time, a lot of laziness when I do have time left. Just so you know, I still have to make a Fugue, a Mordred, a Ye Shunguang, and some Umamusume bots that I've been meaning to make for a while, I apologize for that . _.

┗━━ Shika's Note ━━┛
